│ I re-checked this one. java -jar does fail here for invalid manifest values.
│
│ The JAR spec says Enable-Native-Access only supports ALL-UNNAMED for executable jars:
│ https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/25/docs/specs/jar/jar.html
│
│ With a minimal jar using:
│
│ Enable-Native-Access: SOME-MODULE
│
│ java -jar on Java 25 fails with:
│
│ Error: illegal value "SOME-MODULE" for Enable-Native-Access manifest attribute. Only ALL-UNNAMED is allowed
